summary_en: ¥220.0M upper limit, 100,000 shares (0.55% of shares outstanding), acquisition window May 18 to June 19, 2026, open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange, for allocation to restricted share compensation program beneficiaries.
title_en: Notice of Decision on Treasury Share Acquisition Matters (acquisition of treasury shares under the Articles of Incorporation pursuant to the Companies Act Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: FIDEA Holdings announced on 15 May 2026 a board resolution to acquire up to 100,000 treasury shares (0.55% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum outlay of ¥220.0 million. The acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between 18 May and 19 June 2026. The purpose is to secure shares for distribution to beneficiaries of the company's restricted share compensation program. As of 31 March 2026, the company held 82,015 treasury shares out of 18,142,122 total issued shares (including treasury stock).
